pi_items.source: WebFetch confirmed site is live and accessible; verified as official U.S. Department of Energy website
Apple Support documentation (https://support.apple.com/en-us/111875); iPhone 12 Pro specifications from YesViz and Dimensions.com
iPhone 12 Pro specifications: 390px CSS viewport width (1x), 780px (2x), 1170px (3x physical pixels with 3.0 pixel ratio). Verified via YesViz device database and Apple technical specifications.
WebFetch analysis of energy.gov shows page contains multiple full-width sections with total height >3000px. 1500px is a reasonable minimum for capturing significant page content.
Standard practice for image processing tolerance; allows for minor rendering variations across different systems
Path format is valid Linux path, but cannot verify file will exist without executing task

privileged_info_summary: The task audits mobile responsive design of the Department of Energy website (https://www.energy.gov/) using Microsoft Edge. The iPhone 12 Pro is a real Apple device with a CSS viewport width of 390px and 3x pixel ratio (1170px physical width). The expected screenshot widths of 390, 780, and 1170px correctly represent 1x, 2x, and 3x device scales. The energy.gov website is a substantive multi-section page exceeding 3000px in height, making a 1500px minimum height reasonable for full-page capture verification. Microsoft Edge DevTools includes predefined device emulation for iPhone models and a built-in 'Capture full size screenshot' feature for capturing entire scrolling pages.
